miniapp.name: Sloth Rush
miniapp.subtitle: Race sloths, earn ZZZ Coins
miniapp.description: Free-to-play onchain sloth racing game on Base. Mint your sloth NFT, compete in provably fair races, and earn ZZZ Coins.
miniapp.tagline: Wake up. Race hard. Nap later.
miniapp.ogDescription: Free-to-play onchain sloth racing on Base. Provably fair, truly free to start.
